name: What information do you need from me to generate a knowledge graph and entity file?

mainEntity.name: What information do you need from me to generate a knowledge graph and entity file?

acceptedAnswer.text: You need source data, a target entity list, relationship rules, and a naming standard. If you already have spreadsheets, CRM exports, product catalogs, or content databases, those are usually enough to begin an initial entity file and graph model.
acceptedAnswer.description: Provide source data, entity names, relationship rules, and any naming or taxonomy standards.

description: Provide source data, entity names, relationship rules, and any naming or taxonomy standards.
